slides.title: Build your interface
slides.subtitle: Open the Add panel and drag elements onto the canvas.
slides.imageAlt: Dragging an element from the Add panel to the canvas

slides.title: Style your UI
slides.subtitle: Use the Styling tab to adjust the appearance of your elements.
slides.imageAlt: Opening the Styling tab for a selected element

slides.title: Use bindings
slides.subtitle: Bind properties to dynamic data and formulas so the UI updates automatically.
slides.imageAlt: Binding data and variables to elements in the editor

slides.title: Use workflows
slides.subtitle: Run custom no-code logic when users interact with your app, like clicking an element.
slides.imageAlt: Building and running workflows in the editor

slides.title: Connect your data
slides.subtitle: Set up tables and views in `Data & API`, then show their data in the `Interface`.
slides.imageAlt: Binding data to elements in the editor

slides.title: Secure your logic
slides.subtitle: Add security restrictions to your table views and API endpoints.
slides.imageAlt: Exploring the Data & API area of the editor

slides.title: Go live
slides.subtitle: Publish your application to your own domain or a WeWeb subdomain.
slides.imageAlt: Creating a manual editor commit before publish

slides.title: Want to learn more?
slides.subtitle: Head to the WeWeb Academy for courses, tutorials, and guided paths.
slides.imageAlt: WeWeb Academy guides: Intro, Authentication, Storage, and Securing APIs & Table Views
